# Code of Conduct

This project adopts the **Contributor Covenant, version 2.1** as its code of conduct.

The full text is published at https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/ and is incorporated here by reference.

## Enforcement contact

Instances of unacceptable behavior may be reported to the project maintainers at **mayank@d3.com**.

All complaints will be reviewed and investigated promptly and fairly. Maintainers are obligated to respect the privacy and security of the reporter of any incident.

## Enforcement guidelines

Maintainers follow the [Contributor Covenant Enforcement Ladder](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/#enforcement-guidelines): Correction -> Warning -> Temporary Ban -> Permanent Ban.

## Attribution

Code of Conduct text is taken from the [Contributor Covenant](https://www.contributor-covenant.org), version 2.1, available under [CC BY 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).
